phase_name: Admin Backend Gambar (CRUD + Sync + Atomic Delete)

in_progress_area.state: user minta visualisasi mockup; 3 opsi disiapkan (A inline kontekstual / B section terpisah / C collapse toggle); user belum pilih. AskUserQuestion preview di-reject saat user minta pause.

options.A: Gambar soal di bawah textarea + gambar opsi inline tiap baris A-D (file input + thumbnail + x + alt). RECOMMENDED kontekstual.
options.B: Section 'Gambar' terpisah kumpulkan soal + 4 opsi sekaligus di bawah form.
options.C: Collapse toggle '+ Tambah gambar' per soal/opsi, form ringkas default.

scout_findings.form_view: Views/Admin/ManagePackageQuestions.cshtml — form server-post asp-action CreateQuestion method=post (TANPA enctype multipart, perlu ditambah multipart/form-data). Opsi fixed A-D (optionA..optionD) input-group radio/checkbox correct L150-163. Teks soal textarea L140. Edit pakai JS prefill via AJAX EditQuestion GET JSON + resetForm.
scout_findings.preview_view: Views/Admin/_PreviewQuestion.cshtml — render teks soal L17 + opsi L50-62, BELUM ada gambar (RND-04 = tambah soal+opsi).
scout_findings.controller: AssessmentAdminController.cs — CreateQuestion POST ~L6067, EditQuestion GET JSON ~L6196/L6214, EditQuestion POST ~L6241, DeleteQuestion POST ~L6377, SyncPackagesToPost L5337.
scout_findings.edit_prefill_note: Browser TAK bisa prefill <input type=file> (security) → edit hanya tampil thumbnail gambar lama + checkbox 'Hapus gambar' + pilih file baru=ganti. JSON EditQuestion GET perlu tambah imagePath+imageAlt (Gap 3).

carried_from_352.sync: shared-file path (Pre copy pakai path sama, sync tak hapus file fisik)
carried_from_352.atomic_delete: pola Phase 333 (kumpul path sebelum tx, File.Delete setelah CommitAsync)
carried_from_352.db_columns: ImagePath/ImageAlt sudah ada di PackageQuestion+PackageOption (migration 352 applied)

remaining_questions.Edit: tampil & hapus/ganti: konfirmasi alur thumbnail lama + checkbox hapus + file baru=ganti
remaining_questions.Preview sebelum simpan: client-side JS thumbnail saat pilih file (sebelum submit) vs cukup preview modal setelah simpan
remaining_questions.Feedback validasi gagal: pesan error non-image/>5MB di alert atas (TempData) vs inline dekat field
